creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 5 Sep 2011 08:46:22 GMT, linimon@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Old Synopsis: virtualbox causes panic in vm_page_dirty with INVARIANTS
> New Synopsis: emulators/virtualbox-ose: virtualbox causes panic in
> vm_page_dirty with INVARIANTS

Please attach a full kernel stacktrace and verify that you have rebuild
your virtualbox-ose-kmod port after your last kernel update and also
tell us the exact virtualbox-ose version that you are using. 

This could help you to get a crashdump and generate a stacktrace:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug.html
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug-gdb.html

-- 
Bernhard Froehlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
